visual_description: A group of people in dark robes descend a stone staircase, with a woman with long red hair walking among them. The scene shifts to a dimly lit corridor where silhouetted figures move, including a close‑up of a person with white hair looking to the side. Later, two individuals appear to be restraining or guiding another person through an arched opening into a brighter area.
audio_description: The audio is quiet with faint ambient noise.
